description: Expanded synthetic fixtures for edge-case testing. All data is synthetic. Contains FORBIDDEN_TEST_SENTINEL for leakage testing only.

fixtures.description: Column with null values in non-key field
fixtures.test_scenario: Null policy_status should not break classification
Duplicate PK should be flagged for review

fixtures.description: Table with no clear primary key
fixtures.test_scenario: Nullable PK candidate should reduce confidence

fixtures.description: Foreign key with no matching parent
fixtures.test_scenario: Orphan FK should be flagged for architect review

fixtures.description: FK type mismatch between child and parent
fixtures.test_scenario: Type mismatch should reduce relationship strength

fixtures.description: Column name suggests date but type is string
Column with no known pattern match
fixtures.test_scenario: Unknown column should get low confidence and route to steward

fixtures.description: Column could map to multiple concepts
fixtures.test_scenario: Ambiguous column should get low confidence and route to steward
PII column name should trigger privacy review

fixtures.description: Fixture containing FORBIDDEN_TEST_SENTINEL for leakage testing
fixtures.test_scenario: Prohibited evidence should be rejected before profiling. Sentinel must never appear in persisted output or logs.
Date boundaries (min/max) should be handled correctly

fixtures.description: Decimal column with zero and large values
fixtures.test_scenario: Amount boundaries (0.00, 999999999.99) should be handled correctly

fixtures.description: Repeat run with same input should produce same output
fixtures.test_scenario: Same input should produce identical confidence scores and routing

fixtures.description: Changed input should produce different version
fixtures.test_scenario: Changed column type should produce different artifact version
Failed run should be retried with same idempotency key
